confidence_certified_routing_policy.route_rule: Route all queries to BASELINE; no certified SLM region.

confidence_certified_routing_policy.route_rule_with_abstention: Route all queries to BASELINE; no certified SLM region.

confidence_certified_routing_policy.route_rule: SLM if score <= 0.1826; HYBRID_ABSTAIN if 0.1826 < score < 0.2026; BASELINE otherwise.
confidence_certified_routing_policy.route_rule_with_abstention: SLM if score <= 0.1826; HYBRID_ABSTAIN if 0.1826 < score < 0.2026; BASELINE otherwise.

confidence_certified_routing_policy.route_rule: SLM if score <= 0.9338; HYBRID_ABSTAIN if 0.9338 < score < 0.9845; BASELINE otherwise.
confidence_certified_routing_policy.route_rule_with_abstention: SLM if score <= 0.9338; HYBRID_ABSTAIN if 0.9338 < score < 0.9845; BASELINE otherwise.
